productDisplayName: Timberland Women Femmes White Casual Shoes
description: Run on air in the timberland TMA Rip Current shoe. The Independent Suspension Network offers absolute cushioning, propelling you faster and easily.UpperSynthetic leather upper with stability control frames on the sides of the midfoot Meshed vamp for enhanced breathabilityCentral lacing system with a doggle clip for ease of use and snug, customised FitHaul loops to hang the shoes from a backpackPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole with independent suspension network to make runs all the more comfortableOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with multi-directional grooves and strategically raised throughout for absolute grip and tractionDynamic Traction Zone in the forefoot and shock impact zone in the heel for easier transition from heel-strike to toe-offShoe careWipe dust with a dry, clean clothDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
